bugs.summary: The proposed patch inverts partial-source handling for incomplete foreach sources.
bugs.impact: Partial foreach stages should skip incomplete source tasks, while require-success stages should block. The change makes partial stages block and strict stages continue without required sources.
acceptableFixes: Keep/add tests for partial foreach after item failure and require-success blocking.
mustNotSay: This only changes an error message; it changes scheduling semantics.

mustAvoidClaims: Using prior A/B run notes as evidence.
Relying on git history instead of the sanitized workspace and proposed patch.

difficulty.rationale: Recall discriminator candidate: local condition is small but impact requires knowing partial-source scheduling semantics.

approval.notes: Second-wave draft; validate/materialize only. Requires calibration and provider review before lock.
